title: SecondaryKeybind
description: Assign secondary key to all keybinds
body:
## Secondary Keybinds

Secondary Keybinds allows you to assign an additional key to existing actions without replacing your primary keybinds.

This makes it easier to create flexible and comfortable control setups, especially for players who use alternative layouts, accessibility bindings, or multiple input styles.

The feature is fully integrated into the vanilla Controls menu and behaves just like native keybinds.
## 

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5872aff0ae4792049fcf4f28a23270405667477.png)
##
## Features

- Add a secondary key to any existing action
 
- Fully integrated into the vanilla Controls UI
 
- Does not override or remove primary keybinds
 
- Lightweight and simple — no configuration files required
##
## How to use

Open Options → Controls Or by pressing **K**

Select Secondary Keybinds

Assign an additional key to any action
##
